jsonBody.xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<definitions xmlns="https://www.omg.org/spec/DMN/20191111/MODEL/" id="Definitions_Decision" name="RiesgoCrediticio" namespace="http://camunda.org/schema/1.0/dmn">
  <decision id="Decision_Risk" name="EvaluacionRiesgo">
    <decisionTable id="DecisionTable_Risk">
      <input id="Input_Score">
        <inputExpression id="InputExpression_Score" typeRef="integer">
          <text>scoreCrediticio</text>
        </inputExpression>
      </input>
      <output id="Output_Risk" name="nivelRiesgo" typeRef="string" />
      <rule id="Rule_1">
        <inputEntry id="InputEntry_1">
          <text>>= 700</text>
        </inputEntry>
        <outputEntry id="OutputEntry_1">
          <text>"BAJO"</text>
        </outputEntry>
      </rule>
      <rule id="Rule_2">
        <inputEntry id="InputEntry_2">
          <text>< 700</text>
        </inputEntry>
        <outputEntry id="OutputEntry_2">
          <text>"ALTO"</text>
        </outputEntry>
      </rule>
    </decisionTable>
  </decision>
</definitions>
